name: Coil Crush
outcome: With crushing force, [AttackerName]'s tail suddenly tightens around [TargetName] and the almost bone shattering pressure feels strangely pleasant to [TargetHimOrHer] as air is squeezed out of [TargetHisOrHer] body.
miss: With crushing force, [AttackerName]'s tail tightens suddenly around [TargetName], but [TargetHeOrShe] manages to resist the almost bone shattering pressure!
statusOutcome: The intense pressure from [AttackerHisOrHer] tight coils leaves [TargetName] out of breath and unable to struggle, stunning [TargetHimOrHer]!
